ddls:
CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "datasheet" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet for the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the component */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Whether the component is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the specification parameter (e.g., retention period, erase cycles) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the specification parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the specification parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the specification parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification parameter (e.g., year, cycle, V) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specification_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the specification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specification_versions_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the metric belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric parameter (e.g., page programming time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric parameter (e.g., ms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Whether the device is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_components" (
  "device_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-component pair */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_components_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the permission is for */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the role has read access to the component */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the role has write access to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
